  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Answer
    Immutable answer option on a Page.
    Answer.Builder
    Builder for Answer instances.
    Dialogue
    Immutable dialogue definition built via Dialogue.Builder.
    Dialogue.Builder
    Builder for Dialogue instances.
    DialogueAnsweredEvent
    Bukkit event fired when a player selects an answer within a dialogue.
    DialogueCallback
    Callback invoked at specific points during a Dialogue or Page.
    DialogueProvider
    Abstraction used by LuxDialogues to interact with the concrete dialogue system.
    DialogueRedirectEvent
    Bukkit event fired when a player's dialogue is redirected to another dialogue.
    DialogueStartEvent
    Bukkit event fired when a dialogue starts for a player.
    DialogueStopEvent
    Bukkit event fired when a dialogue stops for a player.
    LuxDialoguesAPI
    Base plugin class for the LuxDialogues API.
    Page
    Single page within a Dialogue.
    Page.Builder
    Builder for Page instances.
